utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: (1) health_coverage: includes both physical and mental health insurance with providers, costs, and coverage descriptions; total monthly cost provided. (2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with provider, costs, coverage, plus photography equipment coverage; total monthly cost provided. (3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with base and adventure add-on, providers, costs, and coverage; total monthly cost provided. (4) additional_services: includes enhancement services (professional liability, disability) with providers, costs, coverage details, and application numbers; total monthly cost provided. (5) total_budget: includes monthly and annual costs and additional breakdown details. Each item is fully specified per the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each provider in the final coverage plan to the closest corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. Many final-plan providers (e.g., BerlinCare Basic, BudgetProtect Essentials, BackpackerSafe Basic, etc.) do not appear in the ratings list, so they cannot be mapped. Only items present in both lists should be included. None of the final plan providers or add-ons exactly match any named options in the ground-truth ratings (which use brands like InsurePlus, LifeFirst, VitalPlus, CareCo, etc.). Therefore, there are no mappable items.
